name: FiveM (GTA V)
author: ops@refx.example
description: Cfx.re multiplayer framework for Grand Theft Auto V. Runs the FXServer artifact with a resources directory; not Steam-based.
startupCommand: ./run.sh +exec server.cfg +set serverProfile default +set sv_maxClients {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}" +set sv_licenseKey {{LICENSE_KEY}} +set endpoint_add_tcp "0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}}" +set endpoint_add_udp "0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}}"

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server
ARTIFACT_URL="https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${FX_VERSION:-latest}/fx.tar.xz"
if [ "${FX_VERSION:-latest}" = "latest" ]; then
  ARTIFACT_URL="https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/fx.tar.xz"
fi
curl -fsSL -o fx.tar.xz "$ARTIFACT_URL"
tar xf fx.tar.xz && rm -f fx.tar.xz
if [ ! -d resources ]; then
  git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git tmp_data && cp -r tmp_data/resources . && cp tmp_data/server.cfg . 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf tmp_data
fi
echo 'FiveM (FXServer) install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the FiveM server list.
Server key from https://keymaster.fivem.net (required to start).
Cfx.re artifact build number, or 'latest' for the newest recommended build.

longDescription: Host a custom GTA V roleplay community with FiveM — resources, scripts and hundreds of slots.
